title: stokesia laevis
intro: Stokesia laevis, also known as blue star, is a perennial plant species native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stokesia laevis include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
